MetricType.description: Statistical type of the primary metric. Drives test selection.
MetricType.title: MetricType

description: Schema version 1.0 — canonical experiment configuration for abkit. Generated from abkit_core.schemas.ExperimentConfig.

primary_metric.description: Canonical name of the main success metric.
primary_metric.title: Primary Metric

metric_type.description: Statistical type of the primary metric: 'proportion' or 'continuous'. Required for analysis runs; optional for spec-validation-only runs.

expected_allocation.description: Planned traffic split by variant. Values must sum to 1.0.
expected_allocation.title: Expected Allocation

unit_of_randomization.description: Unit assigned to variants, e.g. 'user_id' or 'session_id'.
unit_of_randomization.title: Unit Of Randomization

alpha.description: Significance threshold used for planning or reporting.
alpha.title: Alpha

guardrail_metrics.description: Metrics used to detect harmful side effects.
guardrail_metrics.title: Guardrail Metrics

pre_period_window_days.description: Number of days used for CUPED covariates.
pre_period_window_days.title: Pre Period Window Days

srm_alpha.description: Per-experiment SRM detection threshold. Overrides the global default of 0.01. Must be between 0.001 and 0.1.
srm_alpha.title: Srm Alpha

daily_eligible_traffic.description: Expected number of eligible units entering the experiment per day.
daily_eligible_traffic.title: Daily Eligible Traffic

eligibility_rate.description: Fraction of total traffic that is eligible. Between 0 and 1 exclusive.
eligibility_rate.title: Eligibility Rate

traffic_cap.description: Maximum fraction of eligible traffic to route to the experiment. Between 0 and 1 exclusive. Defaults to 1.0 when not set.
traffic_cap.title: Traffic Cap

ramp_up_days.description: Days before full traffic allocation is reached. Treated as a planning buffer, not a novelty-effect model.
ramp_up_days.title: Ramp Up Days

planning_buffer_pct.description: Additional fractional buffer on the planned duration. e.g. 0.2 adds 20 percent.
planning_buffer_pct.title: Planning Buffer Pct

title: ExperimentConfig
